businessQuestion: Which stores have the lowest inventory turnover?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DS.STORE_NAME,
    ROUND(
        SUM(NET_SALES_AMT)/
        NULLIF(AVG(INVENTORY_VALUE_COST),0),2
    ) AS INVENTORY_TURNS
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_INVENTORY FI
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_STORE DS
ON FI.STORE_KEY=DS.STORE_KEY
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SALES FS
ON FI.STORE_KEY=FS.STORE_KEY
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY INVENTORY_TURNS;
businessContext: Supply chain teams want to detect stores holding excessive inventory.
